response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate with extensive full-stack experience far exceeding the 6+ years requirement. His background includes significant work with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, coupled with strong engineering practices like TDD and CI/CD. The direct experience with AI agent development and robust cloud/containerization skills make him a particularly good fit, despite minor gaps in specific framework mentions like Nest.js or Vitest.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Direct experience with AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
Strong engineering practices including TDD, CI/CD, and architecture contributions.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js framework experience.
Specific testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly listed.
Limited explicit mention of Auth/Authz/Security best practices.
